data_quality: GOOD ESTIMATE — inventory and payments data fresh from 4/11 scrape. Business reports carried from 4/8 with April 9 filter sale added. Settlement closed 4/11 at -$314.09 (confirms ad spend trajectory). PPC data carried from 2026-04-04.

fountain._velocity_note: 9 units / 31 days = 0.290 units/day. Unchanged from 04/08 (no new fountain sales).
fountain.overstock_alert: 377 units at 0.290/day = 1,300 days of cover. Monthly storage fees ($246.63) recur — next charge expected mid-May 2026.
fountain._storage_note: Confirmed from prior settlement period. Will recur monthly until inventory reduced.

filters._velocity_note: 5 units / 31 days = 0.161 units/day (up from 0.129/day on 04/08 — April 9 filter sale added)
filters.overstock_alert: 139 units at 0.161/day = 863 days of cover. Filter velocity improving slightly (+1 sale).

bundle.note: Bundle still showing -- for sales on inventory page. 0% CVR persists.

totals._ad_spend_note: Estimated based on settlement charge: $314.09 total for 3/28-4/10 period (14 days). Prior period also had ad spend. Conservative estimate ~$10/day × 31 days = $310. Note: settlement charge delta $19.59 for April 8-10 (3 days) = $6.53/day — may indicate budget throttling or campaigns beginning to underspend.
totals._storage_note: Confirmed monthly FBA storage fee (will recur ~mid-May).

pl_7day._note: Estimated 7-day P&L proportioned from 31-day data + confirmed settlement delta

totals._ad_spend_note: Settlement confirmed $19.59 for 3 days (Apr 8-10) = $6.53/day. 7-day estimate: $6.53/day × 7 = $45.71. Rounding to $45.80.

razor_blade_ratio.note: 0.56 filter units per fountain unit (improved from 0.44 on 04/08 as filter sold April 9 without matching fountain sale). Still below 1.0 target.

unit_economics_per_fountain.status: DEEPLY UNPROFITABLE — no improvement as no new fountain sales

payments_snapshot.note: Prior settlement closed at -$314.09 (vs -$294.50 estimated on 4/8). Difference of +$19.59 represents ~3 days of additional ad spend April 8-10. New settlement clean at $0 — opportunity to limit damage if campaigns paused.

cash_flow_4week._ad_note: Confirmed $6.53/day from settlement delta × 7 days. If campaigns paused: $0.

critical: CAMPAIGNS STILL RUNNING: 7 days past recommendation to pause. Settlement confirmed $314.09 ad spend 3/28-4/10. New period already ~$6.53/day draining. Act now.
ZERO FOUNTAIN SALES 3 DAYS: April 9, 10, 11 confirmed zero fountain sales. BSR deteriorating (129,598 → 136,306). Organic momentum from April 8 lost.
DEEPLY UNPROFITABLE: True contribution margin -$358/month est. Business burns $11.55/day net.
NEXT SETTLEMENT CHARGE 4/25: With $6.53/day spend + fees, new period will accumulate another negative balance. Need to pause campaigns before 4/25.
warning: BSR WORSENING: 129,598 → 136,306 after 3 days without fountain sales. BSR requires consistent sales to maintain.
STORAGE FEES RECURRING: $246.63/month confirmed. Next charge ~mid-May. Overstock must be addressed.
REVIEW STAGNATION: 20 reviews, 5+ days without new review. 13x behind competitor velocity.
RAZOR-BLADE IMPROVING BUT STILL BELOW TARGET: 0.56 ratio (up from 0.44). Need 1.0 for healthy LTV model.
positive: FILTER SALE CONFIRMED: 1 filter sold April 9 ($20). Organic filter attach rate improving.
FILTER CVR EXCEPTIONAL: 5 units / 14 sessions = 35.71% CVR — customers who find filters are highly likely to buy.
REVENUE GROWING YoY: 14 units / $549.91 in 31-day window (up from 13 units / $529.91 on 4/8 — +7.7% revenue).
NEW SETTLEMENT CLEAN SLATE: Starting 4/11 at $0. If campaigns paused this week, minimize damage for the 4/25 settlement.
FILTER VELOCITY UP: 0.129 → 0.161 units/day (+24.8%). Filter repurchase engine beginning to activate.
GROSS MARGIN HEALTHY: 35.9% gross (excl. ad spend, storage). Product economics work — need to fix cost structure.
